name: list_user_media
description: Fetch a paginated list of media posts (photos, videos, carousels) published by the authenticated Instagram user. Returns media IDs, types, captions, timestamps, and permalink URLs.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The Instagram user ID. Use 'me' for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of media fields to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of media items to return per page (max 100).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination to fetch the next page of results.
